calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Yang for and with (administrator) Zong Ming Lin.

The Court stated that this is a petition for final distribution, that everything is in order with the exception of a question regarding fees and costs, that it was addressed in the examiner's notes, that a declaration was filed and asked counsel if he has more to say about it. Mr. Yang stated that in regards to the statutory legal fees and expenses the only issue is the messenger fees, that each delivery is at $75.00 which the examiner feels is too high and that they were just trying to get things filed timely. The Court stated that it is an internal messenger and asked why it is not part of the ordinary expenses of handling the estate. Mr. Yang stated that part of the expenses are included. The Court stated that you are using your own salaried people. Mr. Yang responded that $75.00 is the prevailing rate for messengers, that sometimes they use a messenger and sometimes they use in house staff, that they do so to keep things timely, that there is no issue with the extraordinary fees and that it is all subject to the Court's determination. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
